expression.description: Equivalent expression representation of this attributeMappingSource object.

name.description: Name parameter of the mapping source. Depending on the type property value, this can be the name of the function, the name of the source attribute, or a constant value to be used.

parameters.description: If this object represents a function, lists function parameters. Parameters consist of attributeMappingSource objects themselves, allowing for complex expressions. If type isn't Function, this property is null/empty array.
